54.reason: 循环条件 i<=newl 错误，应改为 i<newl，因为 put[newl] 是字符串结束符 '\0'，不应输出

reasons.buggy-deepseek-chat-1: 1.0 , reason:  循环条件 i<=newl 错误，应改为 i<newl，因为 put[newl] 是字符串结束符 '\0'，不应输出
reasons.buggy-deepseek-chat-2: 1.0 , reason:  Error: The loop condition `i<=newl` includes the null terminator index, causing an extra character (likely a garbage or null byte) to be printed. It should be `i<newl` to only print valid characters.
reasons.buggy-deepseek-reasoner-1: 0.5 , reason:  The loop uses i<=newl, which includes put[newl] (the null terminator), causing an extra character (space or null) to be printed.
reasons.buggy-deepseek-reasoner-2: 1.0 , reason:  loop condition should be i<newl to avoid printing the null terminator
reasons.buggy-qwen3.6-plus-1: 1.0 , reason:  The loop condition `i<=newl` causes it to iterate one step too far, accessing `put[newl]` which is the null terminator `\0`. This results in an extra null character or garbage being printed before the exponent, causing the "Wrong Answer" due to formatting mismatch (e.g., embedded null or extra char). It should be `i < newl`.
reasons.buggy-qwen3.6-plus-2: 1.0 , reason:  The loop condition `i<=newl` causes it to iterate one step too far, accessing `put[newl]` which is the null terminator `\0`. This results in an extra null character or garbage being printed at the end of the mantissa, causing the output mismatch (e.g., `...999\x00e4` vs `...999e4`). It should be `i < newl`.

69.reason: The exponent for numbers less than 1 is off by one; should be -(p+1) instead of -p.

reasons.buggy-deepseek-reasoner-1: 0.5 , reason:  The exponent for numbers less than 1 is off by one; should be -(p+1) instead of -p.
